_comment: Copy this to config.json and customize. All fields are optional.
name: dispatch
_name: Branding name used in Telegram notifications and log output. e.g. 'chilisaus' or 'dispatch'
_startupGraceMs: How long after spawn before stuck-detector and auto-resolve kick in (ms). Default: 90000 (90s)
_stuckThresholdMs: How long a session must run before being considered stuck (ms). Default: 600000 (10min)
_maxWatcherAgeMs: Max age of a watcher process before it is considered stale (ms). Default: 7200000 (2h)
